pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions do not support compiling code for Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin version to support Java 21 instrumentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions fail to instrument or run on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.annotation-api dependency to replace removed javax.annotation in Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and later; code using it will fail to compile or run without the explicit dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from source/target to release for modern Java versioning.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to specify target JDK in modern Maven compiler plugins, ensuring correct boot classpath and API usage.
